name: Creamed Tuna
directions: Melt butter.
Stir in onions, mushrooms and garlic.
Sauté over medium heat until translucent.
Mix in flour.
Mix in wine, stir for a few seconds.
Add milk, peas, mozzarella and tuna.
Cook another 5 minutes or so until thickened.
Add Salt and pepper to taste.
Serve over toast or pasta.
(I prefer to serve this with homemade gnocchi).

name: Tuna Pate
directions: Mix thoroughly by hand.
Chill for 1 to 2 hours.

name: Cream Tuna on Toast
directions: In a medium saucepan melt butter, stir in flour and spices until mixture is thick creamy paste. Slowly stir in milk being careful to constantly stir to prevent lumping. Add cheese. Add tuna after cheese has melted into mixture. Simmer over low heat for ten minutes.
Toast bread, then pour over layer of creamed tuna -- Enjoy.

name: Tuna Pasta Bake
directions: Cook pasta as per packet instructions, drain.
stir in soup milk onions tuna and sweetcorn if using, and heat through stirring regularly.
transfer to a 1.2 lt (2 pint) flame proof dish, top with cheese and grill until golden.

name: Tuna Ball
directions: Rinse and drain tuna.
Squeeze out water.
Combine all ingredients and form a ball.
Refrigerate to chill.
Serve on crackers.

name: Tuna Bake
directions: Cook and drain noodles.
Blend cream cheese and soup.
Stir in tuna, pimento, onion, mustard and milk.
Stir in macaroni, salt, and pepper.
Spoon into casserole dish.
Saute bread crumbs in butter and sprinkle on top.
Bake in preheated oven, 375 for 20-25 minutes.

name: Albacore Tuna Dip
directions: Put all ingredients, except for ketchup, in the bowl of a food processor.
Pulse lightly.
Add ketchup slowly, and taste.
When ready to serve, sprinkle with chopped parsley.

name: Make It Cheesy Tuna Bake
directions: In bottom of lightly greased 9" baking dish, arrange croutons.
In medium bowl, beat milk, soup, and eggs; stir in cheeses, pimentoes, and tuna.
In small skillet, melt butter; add onions and mushrooms; saute until softened.
Spoon veggies over croutons; spread egg-tuna mixture over top.
Cover with foil; refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours.
Remove for refrigerator one hour before baking.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. and bake 35 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Remove foil and bake to golden brown top.
(May use broiler, if desired.).

name: Three Cheese Tuna Bake
directions: Heat oven to 350°F.
Cook noodles according to package directions.  Drain when cooked.
Meanwhile,heat butter in a skillet over medium heat.  Add onion, green pepper and basil.  Cook, stirring often, until vegetables are tender.
Stir in soup, mushrooms with their liquid, and milk.
Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
Place half the noodles in dish.
Dot with half the cottage cheese and half the tuna.
Place 8 of the cheese slices over tuna.
Sprinkle with 1/4 cup of the Parmesan cheese.
Repeat layers.
Spread soup mixture over the top.
Bake 45-55 minutes.

name: Tuna Patties
directions: Combine all ingredients (except butter and oil) in a large bowl. Mix well. Melt butter in a heavy frying pan, or an electric skillet set to 350 degrees.
Form 8 patties, and fry for about 4 minutes per side, until golden brown. (I use an ice-cream scoop to make equal sized portions, drop them directly into the pan, then flatten with a spatula.).
These are really wonderful! Enjoy!
